name: claudeshop
description: ClaudeShop — the Claude-native commerce OS. Inspired by PrestaShop, rebuilt for 2026 with Node 22 + Fastify + Prisma 6 + Next.js 16, a native Claude copilot in the admin, and a typed plugin system.

plugins.name: claudeshop-install
plugins.description: Triggers when a user asks Claude to install, bootstrap, or deploy ClaudeShop. Clones the repo if needed, detects the target environment, runs the phased deploy playbook.
